overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game depicting a medieval great hall with high vaulted wooden ceilings, stone walls, and long dining tables. Students in dark academic robes walk through the hall while natural light streams through arched windows at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval great hall with dining tables and vaulted ceiling

agents.ego_description: standing stationary in the great hall observing the surroundings and passing students

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking from the right side toward the camera and passing by at close range
student in dark robes walking away from the camera toward the far end of the hall

entered.detail: high arched ceiling with exposed dark wooden beams and trusses
gray stone wall with mounted portraits and a large fireplace
gray stone wall with tapestries and wall-mounted fixtures
rows of dark wooden dining tables with attached benches
decorative blue patterned rug running down the central aisle
tall gothic arched windows at the far end letting in natural light

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand medieval hall with soaring vaulted wooden ceilings and stone walls. Natural light filters through tall arched windows at the far end, illuminating the long wooden dining tables and blue carpet runner. Students in dark robes walk through the space, with one passing close to the camera from the right and another walking away toward the distant windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a grand medieval hall where natural light gradually defines the depth of the cavernous space. It begins by capturing the soaring vaulted wooden ceilings and heavy stone walls that frame the interior. As the eye moves deeper into the room, the light filtering through tall arched windows illuminates long wooden dining tables and a blue carpet runner. The scene is then animated by students in dark robes, with one figure passing closely by the camera from the right while another recedes toward the distant, glowing windows.
